title: Hotels.com Gets Refreshingly Literal in New Brand Push
description: Hotels.com's new global campaign emphasizes that its name is refreshingly literal.

title: The Trade Desk remains the dominant DSP but its advertisers are starting to shop around
description: The gap between The Trade Desk’s public confidence and what its advertisers describe on the ground has rarely been harder to close.

title: ‘I’m not selling you hours’: PMG’s push beyond agencies
description: PMG never called itself an agency. Here’s why that matters now.

title: Ad Tech Briefing: The industry is rethinking its foundations as a new world order is established
description: The days of 'fake it 'til you make it' are coming to an end.

title: After WPP reckoning: The case for and against principal media
description: Ten years later, principal media is back in the zeitgeist. Why agencies and brands are clashing over the so-called hidden model.

title: Butler/Till’s first agentic media buying tests cut media and supply chain costs
description: Initial campaign tests by the indie agency and Pubmatic show cost reductions and time saved. Success, inevitably, brings more questions.

title: [AINews] NVIDIA GTC: Jensen goes hard on OpenClaw, Vera CPU, and announces $1T sales backlog in 2027
description: a quiet day lets us reflect on NVIDIA GTC 2026

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Tuesday, March 17
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 17.

title: AI Toys Can Pose Safety Concerns for Children, New Study Suggests Caution
description: When one child told the toy, "I love you," it responded, "As a friendly reminder, please ensure interactions adhere to the guidelines provided."

title: Search Console Adds Brand Filters
description:
Search Console had already provided tools for branded queries, but the new filter makes the process easier and quicker.
The post Search Console Adds Brand Filters appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: Dollar Tree traffic declines, again
description: CEO Mike Creedon attributed the traffic declines to the retailer's restickering efforts, which the executive said are largely complete.

title: Urban Outfitters taps Vans as latest On Rotation partner
description: The collaboration celebrates the skateboarding brand’s 60th “Off the Wall” anniversary and features sneakers, apparel and accessories.

title: Urban Outfitters Inc. builds out second phase of automation in Missouri facility
description: The distribution center, which supports its Nuuly rental brand, will accelerate its digital business and create gains in delivery and logistics.

title: Peloton names interim CFO
description: Chief Accounting Officer Saqib Baig will step into the role following the departure of Liz Coddington.

title: The mounting cost of voice fraud: Revenue loss, broken trust and operational strain
description: Voice fraud is now one of retail’s fastest-growing threats, and fraudsters are winning.
